languages.text: "Ваша Светлость?! У меня есть приказ, а вот уж от сохранности жизни капитана Дунавски зависит выживание всей Клети! Отошлите ее, Богом-Императором заклинаю".
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость?! У меня есть приказ, а вот уж от сохранности жизни капитана Дунавски зависит выживание всей Клети! Отошлите ее, Богом-Императором заклинаю".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the entire Cage! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? I have my orders, and she has to remain in Tsar-Cage!"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the entire Cage! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."

languages.text: 「貴方様？私は命令を受けているので、彼女はツァー・ケージに留まらねばなりません！」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? I have my orders, and she has to remain in Tsar-Cage!"

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様？私は命令を受けているので、彼女はツァー・ケージに留まらねばなりません！」

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Ben emir aldım ama Yüzbaşı Dunawski'nin ölümü, bildiğimiz şekliyle Kafes'in sonu anlamına gelir! Tanrı-İmparator aşkına... Yalvarırım onu geri gönderin."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Ben emir aldım ama Yüzbaşı Dunawski'nin ölümü, bildiğimiz şekliyle Kafes'in sonu anlamına gelir! Tanrı-İmparator aşkına... Yalvarırım onu geri gönderin."

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Tengo mis órdenes, ¡pero la muerte de la capitana Dunawski sería el fin de la Jaula tal y como la conocemos! Por favor, por amor del Dios Emperador, envíela de vuelta».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Tengo mis órdenes, ¡pero la muerte de la capitana Dunawski sería el fin de la Jaula tal y como la conocemos! Por favor, por amor del Dios Emperador, envíela de vuelta».

languages.text: “舰长大人！我有命在身，可要是杜纳芙斯卡上尉死了，牢笼就全完了！求您看在神皇的份上，把她调回去吧。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！我有命在身，可要是杜纳芙斯卡上尉死了，牢笼就全完了！求您看在神皇的份上，把她调回去吧。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! J'ai reçu des ordres, mais la mort de la capitaine Dunawski signerait la fin de la Cage telle que nous la connaissons ! Par l'Empereur-Dieu, je vous en implore : renvoyez-la. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! J'ai reçu des ordres, mais la mort de la capitaine Dunawski signerait la fin de la Cage telle que nous la connaissons ! Par l'Empereur-Dieu, je vous en implore : renvoyez-la. »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich habe meine Befehle, aber Captain Dunawskis Tod wäre das Ende des Käfigs wie wir ihn kennen! Bitte, beim Gottimperator, schickt sie zurück."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich habe meine Befehle, aber Captain Dunawskis Tod wäre das Ende des Käfigs wie wir ihn kennen! Bitte, beim Gottimperator, schickt sie zurück."
